description: An engineer needs to share a technical drawing with a foreign supplier, but must first ensure it complies with ITAR (International Traffic in Arms Regulations).

nodes.task_description: Identify the technical data to be shared.
Check the drawing's classification against the U.S. Munitions List to determine if it is export-controlled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the drawing is controlled under ITAR.

nodes.task_description: Apply for an export license or verify that a license exception is available before sending the data to the foreign supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines a license is required and submits the application.
